zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏多格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元维持窄幅震荡偏多格局，价格围绕71美元整理，整体运行于20日均线上方，短线多头结构尚未破坏，但动能略有放缓

MACD指标维持正值柱体0.58附近，显示多头动能仍在但未放大；均线系统支撑有效，缺乏RSI情况下需观察量能配合，防止动能钝化

下方关键支撑位于70.4与70.7区域，对应SMA20与日内低点，上方阻力关注71.5及72整数关口，突破需放量确认方具持续性

交易策略以回踩支撑低吸为主，若跌破70.4则短线转为观望；突破71.5可顺势跟进，止损控制在区间下沿附近以防假突破风险

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation near 71.15 after a mild intraday pullback of -0.48%. Price action remains structurally constructive as it holds above the 20-day SMA at 70.43, indicating short-term bullish bias despite limited momentum. The recent range between 70.69 and 71.52 suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers, with market participants awaiting a decisive breakout to define the next directional impulse.

Momentum indicators point to a cautiously bullish environment. The MACD reading at 0.582 suggests positive momentum expansion, even though a signal line value is not provided for full confirmation. Price holding above the SMA(20) reinforces near-term trend support. However, the absence of RSI limits overbought/oversold clarity, implying conditions are neutral-to-bullish rather than extended, with buyers gradually maintaining control in current structure.

Key support is located at the 20-day SMA around 70.43, followed by psychological support near 70.00, which may act as a demand zone on minor dips. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 71.52, the recent high. A sustained breakout above this level could open a path toward 72.50–73.00, where prior liquidity pockets and short-term profit-taking may emerge in the short term.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range-bound strategies until a clear breakout confirms direction. Buying near support around 70.40 with tight risk management below 70.00 may be viable for swing traders, while breakout traders can look for entries above 71.60 with confirmation. Given subdued volatility, disciplined position sizing and patience remain essential to avoid false moves and whipsaws in current conditions.
